nasb.text: They will therefore stumble over each other as if running from the sword, although no one is pursuing; and you will have no strength to stand up before your enemies.

esv.text: They shall stumble over one another, as if to escape a sword, though none pursues. And you shall have no power to stand before your enemies.

cnv.text: 雖然無人追趕，他們卻像面臨刀劍，彼此撞跌；你們在仇敵面前，不能站立得住。

ccb.text: 即使无人追赶，他们也将仓皇逃命，互相绊倒，如同躲避刀剑一样。你们必无力抵挡敌人。
